overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), following a character through neon-lit commercial plazas, under massive concrete overpasses, along busy streets with futuristic vehicles, and into covered walkways with large digital billboards. The footage features high-fidelity game engine graphics with atmospheric neon lighting and ray-traced reflections.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic commercial plaza at night, dominated by neon lighting and large digital billboards. The character descends a glowing staircase into a lower level, transitioning from an open plaza toward a covered walkway entrance.

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass, the scene is dimly lit with artificial lighting. Illuminated art gallery frames line the right wall while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The environment feels enclosed and urban, with the heavy infrastructure dominating overhead.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a busy street level under the overpass, with futuristic vehicles driving past on the left. Yellow safety barriers line the sidewalk while pedestrians walk in the same direction. The camera passes street lights and approaches a crosswalk, with tall illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street, the character enters a fully enclosed pedestrian corridor. The environment shifts to a narrow walkway lined with massive digital billboards displaying animated advertisements. Bright illuminated pillars and reflective surfaces create a high-tech atmosphere, while the corridor extends into the distance with neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district that shifts from an open commercial plaza into a confined, high-tech pedestrian corridor. It begins by descending a glowing staircase from a bright plaza, transitioning from the open air toward the entrance of a covered walkway. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes enclosed beneath a massive concrete overpass where dimly lit artificial lights illuminate art gallery frames and passing pedestrians. The scene then opens up to a busy street level, passing yellow safety barriers and futuristic vehicles before crossing toward a skyline of illuminated skyscrapers. Finally, the camera enters a narrow, fully enclosed corridor lined with massive animated digital billboards and reflective pillars that stretch into the neon-lit distance.
